description: Show a Budgeted Production Quantity associated with the specified Project.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the Budgeted Production Quantity

unit_of_measure.description: The measuerment of the install production quantity

project_id.description: The Project ID the Budgeted Production Quantity was created with

wbs_code_id.description: The Production Quantity Code for the Budgeted Production Quantity.

quantity.description: Amount of cost code budgeted to be installed

updated_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was updated

created_at.description: Date the actual production quantity was created
